title: 2 Pack 15m (30m) Steel Core Clothes Washing Line Heavy Duty Extra Strong PVC Coated Weather and Rust Resistant Laundry Drying Line (Silver)
features: 2 Pack of 15m Steel Core Clothes Washing Line 30m 100ft total
Heavy-duty steel core for extra strength
PVC coating for durability and weather resistance
Ultra smooth finish keeps your clothes in Tip Top condition
Make sure to tie robust knots as steel core is harder to tie than rope.
description: 2 Pack of 15m (30m total) Steel Core Clothes Washing Line - the perfect solution for all your laundry drying needs. Made with a heavy-duty steel core for extra strength and coated in PVC for added durability, this washing line is built to last. The steel core adds strength while the PVC coating is strong, durable and weather resistant. A household essential, our steel core clothes line is a must-have for any home. Simply attach it wherever you choose and enjoy the convenience of air-drying your laundry. The PVC coating is easy to wipe clean, ensuring your washing line stays looking its best for years to come.
